member.name: T:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.CaretExpressionAnalyzer
member.summary: Analyzes the expression at selected caret position to determine the nearest declaring type. Some parts of the code is based on https://github.com/zzzprojects/System.Linq.Dynamic.Core and licensed under the Apache 2.0 license.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.StringParser
member.summary: Parse a Double and Single Quoted string. Some parts of the code is based on https://github.com/zzzprojects/Eval-Expression.NET

member.name: T:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.ExpressionScriptEditor
member.summary: Provides a user interface editor that displays a dialog box for editing the expression script.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.ScintillaExpressionScriptEditor.#ctor(System.Drawing.Design.UITypeEditor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.ExpressionScriptEditorDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.ExpressionScriptEditorDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Scripting.Expressions.Design.Properties.Resources.FieldIcon
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.
